title: friesodielsia borneensis var. sumatrana
intro: Friesodielsia borneensis var. sumatrana, also known as Sumatran Friesodielsia, is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. It is a shrub native to Sumatra, Indonesia, and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, Friesodielsia borneensis var. sumatrana is often used in infusions or decoctions, and its leaves, bark, or roots are dried and processed into various forms, such as powder or capsules, for use in traditional medicine.
